description:
**Milestone:** Chunked Retrieval Engine

Create apps/server/src/routes/knowledge/ route module. Add POST /api/knowledge/search (body: {projectPath, query, maxResults?, maxTokens?, sourceTypes?}) that calls KnowledgeStoreService.search() and returns results. Add POST /api/knowledge/stats (body: {projectPath}) that returns KnowledgeStoreStats (chunk count by source type, db size, last rebuilt timestamp, index health). Add POST /api/knowledge/rebuild (body: {projectPath}) that calls rebuildIndex() and returns stats. Wire these routes into apps/server/src/index.ts under the knowledge router. Also initialize KnowledgeStoreService for the project path on server startup (call initialize + rebuildIndex if db doesn't exist) in the appropriate server init location.

**Files to Modify:**
- apps/server/src/routes/knowledge/index.ts
- apps/server/src/routes/knowledge/routes/search.ts
- apps/server/src/routes/knowledge/routes/stats.ts
- apps/server/src/routes/knowledge/routes/rebuild.ts
- apps/server/src/index.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] POST /api/knowledge/search returns ranked chunks with scores and source metadata
- [ ] POST /api/knowledge/stats returns chunk counts by source type and db file size
- [ ] POST /api/knowledge/rebuild triggers full re-ingestion and returns updated stats
- [ ] Routes follow existing route handler pattern (createLogger, Request/Response types)
- [ ] Server initializes knowledge store on startup for the configured project path
- [ ] npm run build:server && npm run test:server passes

**Complexity:** medium
